description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a spacious, open layout. The front features large, floor-to-ceiling windows and a gated driveway with space for two cars, as well as a small landscaped garden. The structure is primarily composed of white and light gray materials, with extensive use of glass for natural lighting. The side and rear elevations show additional large windows and a mix of solid and transparent wall sections, providing a sense of openness. The property is enclosed by a low wall and includes a paved area adjacent to the main building. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a minimalist aesthetic.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a gated driveway, and minimalist landscaping. The design features clean lines and extensive use of glass and white surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gated driveway, two-car parking, landscaped garden, and large front windows.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the extended paved area, side windows, and the open layout of the main living spaces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back wall with several large windows and minimal exterior detailing.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the enclosed yard, driveway, and additional windows along the side facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on the front and sides
